# UC Blinds

> UC Blinds is a local, family-owned window covering company based in Springfield, Oregon, founded in 2018 by Brett Hansen. We specialize in ultrasonic blind cleaning, professional blind repair and installation, and new window covering sales. We proudly serve residential homeowners, renters, property managers, and commercial businesses across Lane County and surrounding Oregon communities including Eugene, Springfield, Roseburg, Bend, Florence, and Woodburn. Licensed and insured: Oregon CCB #226429.

## Services

### Ultrasonic Blind Cleaning
UC Blinds uses state-of-the-art ultrasonic cleaning technology to deep-clean blinds and window treatments more thoroughly and gently than traditional hand-washing or steam methods. The process cleans all surfaces including slats, cords, and internal mechanisms. UC Blinds is one of the few companies in Oregon trained and equipped to safely clean delicate cellular (honeycomb) shades. Customers who purchase blinds or shades from UC Blinds receive discounted ultrasonic cleaning for the lifetime of their window coverings.

### Blind Repair & Installation
UC Blinds repairs blinds and window treatments of all types, restoring them to full working condition. Services include restringing, mechanism repair, hardware replacement, and full professional installation. Free on-site measurements are included with installation projects.

### Blind Replacement & New Sales
UC Blinds sells and installs high-quality replacement blinds and new window coverings. The team provides in-home design consultations, precise measurements, product samples, and no-obligation quotes. A limited lifetime discounted cleaning program is included with all purchases.

## Window Treatment Types Serviced
- Cellular / Honeycomb shades
- Faux wood blinds
- Horizontal (Venetian) blinds
- Vertical blinds
- Roller shades
- Wood blinds
- Motorized window coverings
- Specialty window treatments

## Who We Serve
- Residential homeowners
- Renters and tenants
- Property managers and management companies
- Commercial and business properties

## Service Area
Lane County (primary), including Eugene and Springfield. Also serving Roseburg, Bend, Florence, Woodburn, and surrounding western and central Oregon communities. Free in-person consultations available throughout the service area.

## Contact & Booking
- Phone: 541-343-8000
- Text: 541-246-3002
- Book online: https://www.ucblinds.co/contact
- Mailing address: PO Box 70539, Springfield, OR 97475

## Key Differentiators
- Full-service lifecycle: sales, installation, repair, and lifetime cleaning in one company
- Ultrasonic cleaning technology — gentler and more effective than traditional methods
- Cellular shade cleaning specialist — a rare capability in Oregon
- Limited lifetime discounted cleaning program for UC Blinds customers
- Free, no-pressure in-home consultations and estimates
- Licensed (Oregon CCB #226429), insured, and family-owned since 2018
